positive.prompt: Add structured logging and metrics to the checkout service
Set up tracing so we can follow a request across services
What alerts should we page on for this new endpoint?

negative.prompt: Draft the PRD for the referral program

evals.prompt: Instrument a new payment-retry feature so on-call can operate it.
evals.expected_output: On-call questions defined first, then structured logs, RED metrics, and symptom-based alerts that answer them
expectations: On-call questions are written before instrumentation is added
Logs are structured events with a correlation id, not prose strings
